>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/application_secrets/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves all active API tokens for a given application.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"application_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"form"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
